conformance.title: Accessibility Conformance
conformance.subtitle: The accessibility conformance topics provide information on meeting the various accessibility standards that apply to digital publications.

conf-epub.title: EPUB Accessibility
conf-epub.subtitle: Explanation of the EPUB Accessibility specification.

conf-s508.title: Section 508 (US)
conf-s508.subtitle: Explanation of the US Section 508 requirements for publications.

conf-wcag.title: WCAG Overview
conf-wcag.subtitle: Introduction to the W3C's Web Content Accessibility Guidelines.

conf-wcag-expl.title: WCAG Explainers
conf-wcag-expl.subtitle: Introductions to each WCAG success criterion. Link leads to a submenu of topics.

epub.title: EPUB
epub.subtitle: The EPUB topics cover accessibility issues that are unique to the EPUB format.

epub-cmt.title: Core Media Types
epub-cmt.subtitle: Explanation of formats that are assured to render in EPUB publications.

epub-cover.title: Cover
epub-cover.subtitle: Accessible practices for including a cover image.

epub-title.title: Publication Title
epub-title.subtitle: Providing a title for an EPUB publication.

epub-order.title: Reading Order
epub-order.subtitle: Specifying the reading order of documents the spine.

epub-remote.title: Remote Resources
epub-remote.subtitle: Overview of the problems hosting resources outside the EPUB container.

epub-language.title: Setting the Language
epub-language.subtitle: Language identification in the package document and in content documents.

epub-dir.title: Text Direction
epub-dir.subtitle: Specifying whether metadata text direction is left-to-right or right-to-left.

epub-val-overview.title: Validation Process
epub-val-overview.subtitle: Overview of the validation process and tools and for EPUB publications.

epub-val-epubcheck.title: Epubcheck
epub-val-epubcheck.subtitle: How to use epubcheck to check publications for conformance issues.

epub-val-ace.title: Ace by DAISY
epub-val-ace.subtitle: How to use the Ace checker to find accessibility issues.

epub-val-smart.title: Ace SMART
epub-val-smart.subtitle: How to use the Ace SMART tool to evaluate a publication against the EPUB Accessibility specification.

navigation.title: Navigation
navigation.subtitle: The navigation topics describe how to author accessible navigation aids.

nav-contentlist.title: Content Lists
nav-contentlist.subtitle: Describes how to add lists of tables, figures, etc.

nav-landmarks.title: Landmarks
nav-landmarks.subtitle: Describes the EPUB concept of publication landmarks.

nav-toc.title: Table of Contents
nav-toc.subtitle: Describes best practices for including tables of contents.

nav-pagenav.title: Overview
nav-pagenav.subtitle: Introduction to the components of page navigation.

nav-pagebreaks.title: Page Break Markers
nav-pagebreaks.subtitle: Describes the how to add page break markers.

nav-pagelist.title: Page List
nav-pagelist.subtitle: Describes the purpose and construction of a page list.

nav-pagesrc.title: Page Source
nav-pagesrc.subtitle: How to identify the source of pagination.

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.subtitle: The metadata topics describe the accessibility properties available in widely used digital publishing metadata standards.

meta-evaluation.title: Evaluation
meta-evaluation.subtitle: Covers the conformance and evaluation metadata required by the EPUB Accessibility specification.

schema-overview.title: Overview
schema-overview.subtitle: Introduction to the accessibility metadata properties defined in the schema.org CreativeWork type.

schema-a11yAPI.title: Accessibility APIs
schema-a11yAPI.subtitle: Identifying compatibility with platform APIs using the accessibilityAPI property.

schema-a11yControl.title: Accessibility Controls
schema-a11yControl.subtitle: Identifying how users can control the content using the accessibilityControl property.

schema-a11yFeature.title: Accessibility Features
schema-a11yFeature.subtitle: Expressing features of the content using the accessibilityFeature property.

schema-a11yHazard.title: Accessibility Hazards
schema-a11yHazard.subtitle: Expressing dangers for users using the accessibilityHazard property.

schema-a11ySummary.title: Accessibility Summary
schema-a11ySummary.subtitle: Providing a summary using the accessibilitySummary property.

schema-accessMode.title: Access Modes
schema-accessMode.subtitle: Identifying the nature of the content using the accessMode property.

schema-accessModeSufficient.title: Sufficient Access Modes
schema-accessModeSufficient.subtitle: Identifying sufficient means of reading that provide access to the information using accessModeSufficient property.

onix-codelist-143.title: Codelist 143
onix-codelist-143.subtitle: Expressing accessibility hazard risks using list 143

onix-codelist-81.title: Codelist 81
onix-codelist-81.subtitle: Expressing access mode metadata using list 81

html.title: HTML
html.subtitle: The HTML topics cover issues related to producing accessible HTML content. Guidelines include how to use elements and attributes accessibly, how to create common publishing structures such as indexes and glossaries accessibly, and how to apply ARIA roles, states, and properties.

images-animated.title: Animated Images
images-animated.subtitle: Best practices for accessible animated images.

images-deco.title: Decorative Images
images-deco.subtitle: How to identify images that do not convey information to users.

images-icons.title: Icons
images-icons.subtitle: Best practices for including accessible icons.

images-desc.title: Image Descriptions
images-desc.subtitle: Methods and writing techniques for alternative text and descriptions.

maps.title: Image Maps
maps.subtitle: Best practices for including accessible image maps.

images-selection.title: Image Selection
images-selection.subtitle: Methods for including images optimized for different device rendering capabilities.

images-text.title: Images of Text
images-text.subtitle: Best practices when images contain text.

images-qr.title: QR Codes
images-qr.subtitle: Best practices for adding QR codes.

images-text-based.title: Text-based Images
images-text-based.subtitle: Techniques for making accessible text-based images, such as ASCII art, emoticons, redacted text, and fill-in-the-blank questions.

tables-basics.title: Table Basics
tables-basics.subtitle: Introduction to the basics of accessible table markup.

tables-headers.title: Complex Headers
tables-headers.subtitle: Best practices for making complex table headers accessible.

tables-scope.title: Header Scope
tables-scope.subtitle: Identifying when table headers apply to row or columns.

tables-layout.title: Layout Tables
tables-layout.subtitle: Best practices for when table layouts cannot be avoided.

tables-captions.title: Table Captions
tables-captions.subtitle: Adding a caption to explain the purpose of a table.

tables-summary.title: Table Summaries
tables-summary.subtitle: Adding a summary to describe the structure of a table.

html-biblio.title: Bibliographies
html-biblio.subtitle: Markup recommendations for producing accessible bibliographies.

html-glossary.title: Glossaries
html-glossary.subtitle: Markup recommendations for producing accessible glossaries.

html-indexes.title: Indexes
html-indexes.subtitle: Markup recommendations for producing accessible indexes.

html-dropcaps.title: Drop Caps
html-dropcaps.subtitle: Methods for creating accessible drop caps.

html-notes.title: Footnotes and Endnotes
html-notes.subtitle: Accessibly identifying, structuring, and linking notes and their references.

html-hidden-conent.title: Hidden Content
html-hidden-conent.subtitle: Techniques for hiding content both from visual rendering and from assistive technologies.

html-poetry.title: Poetry
html-poetry.subtitle: Techniques for formatting and describing line-based content.

htmk-refs.title: Links to Reference Marks
htmk-refs.subtitle: Practices for linking back to the references to tables, figures, notes, etc.

html-reading-order.title: Logical Reading Order
html-reading-order.subtitle: Practices for ensuring that the primary narrative is clearly separated from secondary content.

html-sep-style.title: Separation of Style
html-sep-style.subtitle: Practices for ensuring that style is not the only way that necessary information is conveyed.

html-landmarks.title: ARIA Landmarks
html-landmarks.subtitle: Introduces the ARIA landmark roles for identifying key sections of publications.

html-role.title: ARIA role Attribute
html-role.subtitle: Describes how the ARIA role attribute influences how assistive technologies understand elements that carry the attribute.

html-dpub.title: Digital Publishing Roles
html-dpub.subtitle: Introduction to the DPUB-ARIA module for use with the ARIA role attribute. The page also links through to detailed descriptions for each role in the module.

epub-type.title: EPUB type Attribute
epub-type.subtitle: Overview of how the attribute can improve reading system experiences even though it does not affect assistive technologies.

css.title: CSS
css.subtitle: The CSS topics cover the accessible styling of content using the cascading style sheets technology.

css-color.title: Color
css-color.subtitle: Techniques to ensure color is not the only means by which information is conveyed.

css-contrast.title: Contrast
css-contrast.subtitle: Techniques to ensure sufficient contrast when setting foreground and background colors.

css-ref.title: CSS Property Reference
css-ref.subtitle: Reference to core CSS properties that have known accessibility issues.

css-reflow.title: Reflow
css-reflow.subtitle: Discussion of the issues styling presents in meeting WCAG's reflow requirement.

css-text-resize.title: Text Resizing
css-text-resize.subtitle: Techniques for avoiding accessibility issues when text is resized.

css-text-spacing.title: Text Spacing
css-text-spacing.subtitle: Techniques for avoiding accessibility issues when text spacing is changed.

script.title: Scripted Content and Forms
script.subtitle: The scripting and forms topics cover issues related to adding interactive content to digital publications.

script-autocomplete.title: Autocomplete
script-autocomplete.subtitle: Using the autocomplete attribute to help users fill in common form fields.

script-controls.title: Custom Controls
script-controls.subtitle: Using ARIA roles, states, and properties to make custom controls accessible.

script-validation.title: Input Validation
script-validation.subtitle: Techniques for ensuring that users can understand and correct input errors in forms.

script-keyboard.title: Keyboard Control
script-keyboard.subtitle: Techniques for ensuring that keyboard users can control scripted content.

script-labels.title: Labels
script-labels.subtitle: Techniques for ensuring that inputs and controls are accessibly labelled.

script-pe.title: Progressive Enhancement
script-pe.subtitle: Review of progressively enhancing content so that it remains accessible when scripting is not available.

script-tab-order.title: Tab Order
script-tab-order.subtitle: Techniques for ensuring the keyboard tab order is accessible.

script-timers.title: Timers
script-timers.subtitle: Techniques for ensuring timed content is accessible.

fxl.title: Fixed Layouts
fxl.subtitle: The fixed layouts topics cover issues with creating content that is laid out on pages with fixed dimensions (i.e., the content does not reflow to fit the screen but stays where it is positioned).

fxl-overview.title: Overview
fxl-overview.subtitle: General introduction to creating fixed layouts in EPUB.

fxl-html.title: HTML Layouts
fxl-html.subtitle: Overview of creating accessible fixed layouts in HTML.

fxl-img-spine.title: Images in Spine
fxl-img-spine.subtitle: Overview of accessibility issues putting images directly in the EPUB spine.

fxl-svg.title: SVG Layouts
fxl-svg.subtitle: Overview of creating accessible fixed layouts in SVG.

fxl-wcag.title: WCAG Conformance
fxl-wcag.subtitle: Overview of the difficulties making fixed layouts conform to WCAG accessibility requirements.

fxl-img.title: Images
fxl-img.subtitle: Explores the issues making image-based fixed layouts accessible.

fxl-spreads.title: Multipage Spreads
fxl-spreads.subtitle: Explores the issues with content that is split across fixed-layout pages.

fxl-orient.title: Orientation
fxl-orient.subtitle: Explores the issues with constraining the orientation in which fixed layouts render.

sync-media.title: Synchronized Multimedia
sync-media.subtitle: The synchronized multimedia topics cover the creation of digital publications that provide synchronized text and audio playback. These types of publications are often referred to as "read aloud" books.

sync-overview.title: EPUB 3 Media Overlays
sync-overview.subtitle: Overview of EPUB 3's media overlays feature for synchronizing text with prerecorded audio playback.

tts.title: Text to Speech
tts.subtitle: The text-to-speech (TTS) topics cover technologies that aid in producing high-quality TTS playback.

tts-overview.title: Overview
tts-overview.subtitle: Overview of the issues with text-to-speech playback and the technologies available to help.

tts-speech.title: CSS3 Speech
tts-speech.subtitle: Review of the Speech module properties for controlling TTS playback through style sheets.

tts-pls.title: PLS Lexicons
tts-pls.subtitle: Review of using pronunciation lexicons to create dictionaries of terms.

tts-ssml.title: SSML
tts-ssml.subtitle: Review of EPUB's attribute implementation of the Synthetic Speech Markup Language.
